productDisplayName: Vans Men Desurgent Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Retaining the classic side stripe, the Desurgent from vans features a modern cupsole deisgned by Scotty Cramer. The Desurgent is an all round action sport performamce shoe that is styled to add a rakist twist to your dressy casual wardrobe. Design details are made to augment the the high-quality upper. UpperLeather, suede and mesh uppers with double and triple stitchingVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sock liner Central lacing systemWoven tongue labelInternal elastic tongue staysPerforated quarter and vamp panelsPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortCut low at the ankle for styleMidsoleDie cut EVA midsoleOutsoleMulticolour SBR rubber outsole with Vans' WaffleGrip patterningShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
